name: safari-excalidraw-stepwise-red-flower
description: Safari Excalidraw demo recipe: open a clean canvas, draw stem and leaves first, then petals, then flower center with visible pauses for fullscreen recording.

steps.text:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="560" height="620" viewBox="0 0 560 620">
  <rect width="560" height="620" fill="#ffffff"/>
  <line x1="280" y1="555" x2="280" y2="315" stroke="#12822b" stroke-width="24" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <path d="M278 455 C205 408 138 422 84 472 C154 526 226 523 284 466 Z" fill="#58ba55" stroke="#108126" stroke-width="14" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  <path d="M284 466 C344 410 424 421 482 468 C408 528 336 530 280 480 Z" fill="#64c764" stroke="#108126" stroke-width="14" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="560" height="620" viewBox="0 0 560 620">
  <rect width="560" height="620" fill="#ffffff"/>
  <line x1="280" y1="555" x2="280" y2="382" stroke="#177f2c" stroke-width="24" stroke-linecap="round"/>

  <path d="M284 466 C344 410 424 421 482 468 C408 528 336 530 280 480 Z" fill="#64c764" stroke="#16862c" stroke-width="14" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  <g transform="translate(280 290)">
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="-118" rx="48" ry="78" fill="#e73333" stroke="#a81620" stroke-width="13"/>
    <ellipse cx="-78" cy="-68" rx="52" ry="78" transform="rotate(-48 -78 -68)" fill="#f14b48" stroke="#a81620" stroke-width="13"/>
    <ellipse cx="78" cy="-68" rx="52" ry="78" transform="rotate(48 78 -68)" fill="#f14b48" stroke="#a81620" stroke-width="13"/>
    <ellipse cx="-112" cy="22" rx="45" ry="70" transform="rotate(-80 -112 22)" fill="#ff3a31" stroke="#a81620" stroke-width="13"/>
    <ellipse cx="112" cy="22" rx="45" ry="70" transform="rotate(80 112 22)" fill="#ff3a31" stroke="#a81620" stroke-width="13"/>
    <ellipse cx="-58" cy="82" rx="54" ry="76" transform="rotate(40 -58 82)" fill="#dc272d" stroke="#a81620" stroke-width="13"/>
    <ellipse cx="58" cy="82" rx="54" ry="76" transform="rotate(-40 58 82)" fill="#dc272d" stroke="#a81620" stroke-width="13"/>
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="110" rx="43" ry="68" fill="#ea332e" stroke="#a81620" stroke-width="13"/>
  </g>
</svg>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="560" height="620" viewBox="0 0 560 620">
  <rect width="560" height="620" fill="#ffffff"/>
  <line x1="280" y1="555" x2="280" y2="382" stroke="#177f2c" stroke-width="24" stroke-linecap="round"/>

    <ellipse cx="0" cy="110" rx="43" ry="68" fill="#ea332e" stroke="#a81620" stroke-width="13"/>
